name: Consensus
one_line: AI search engine that returns cited, peer-reviewed research papers via API and MCP.
self_serve_detail: API is application-only with a custom quote (baseline ~$0.10/call + platform fee); submit a request-access form, no self-serve key issuance. The MCP is free and needs no account to try.

name: Reducto
one_line: Agentic document-processing API for parsing, extracting, splitting, classifying and editing PDFs/files.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free studio.reducto.ai account, create an API key in the sidebar (free tier + pay-as-you-go Standard plan). No approval needed.
api_surface: REST broad (parse, extract, split, classify, edit, upload)

name: Devin
one_line: AI software engineer; API manages sessions, knowledge, playbooks and orchestration programmatically.
self_serve_detail: Requires a Devin (paid) account/org; in Settings > Service users create a service user and generate a cog_ API key. Service user keys are generally available; personal access tokens are closed beta (contact support).
api_surface: REST broad (v3 orgs/enterprise: sessions, knowledge, playbooks, schedules)

name: higgsfield
one_line: AI media generation platform (images, video, 3D, audio) via CLI, REST Cloud API and MCP.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Higgsfield account (new accounts get free credits); CLI higgsfield auth login or Cloud API key/secret from cloud.higgsfield.ai. Paid plans unlock higher volume/longer durations/broader models.
api_surface: REST broad (per-model generate, soul, upload, voices) + CLI

name: YouTube Transcript (TranscriptAPI)
one_line: Managed API to extract YouTube transcripts plus search, channel and playlist endpoints.
self_serve_detail: Free signup with 100 free credits; API key issued instantly in dashboard (Bearer token). Paid plans only needed when free credits run out; no approval required.
api_surface: REST broad (transcript, info, search, channel, playlist)
